Text: A dynamite that releases a burst of water when it explodes. Does not affect terrain or beavers.
Inspired by the name recovered from a hooman \bathroom manual\". Apparently explosions were part of proper hygiene."
A dynamite that releases a burst of badwater when it explodes. Does not affect terrain or beavers.
In the same manual, apparently this explosive discharge is sure to follow after the use of an interesting artifact called taco.
